title: Yelanon Felt Furniture Pads 261 Pcs Furniture Pads Self Adhesive, Felt Chair Pads, Anti Scratch Floor Protectors for Furniture Feet Chair Legs, Furniture Felt Pads for Hardwoods Floors, Beige
features: BEST PROTECTION＆ANTI SCRATCH - Place our felt furniture pads on the legs of your furniture, including beds, tables, chairs, sofas and appliances to provide the best protection for your wood, laminate or tile floor. And you never have to hear that annoying scraping noise again.

LARGE VARIETY PACK - Our 261pcs Pack with a box contains felt furniture pads of the 10 sizes, round shape: (64)3/8’’, (40)3/4", (60)1",(8)1.5", (4)2" square shape: (40)3/4×3/4",(36)1"x1", (4)6"x1/2", (4)2"x2", (1)5"x6". These various size felt pads are fit for all your furniture and you can store rest floor protectors for furniture legs.

EXTRA-STRONG ADHESIVE - We professionally designed and produce self-stick felt pads for chair legs and other furniture. Yelanon anti scratch furniture pads made of high-density felt that keeps the felt furniture pads in place firmly and last longer.

NO TOOLS NECESSARY - Self Stick floor protectors for furniture legs can quickly be applied at the first sign of friction with the floor or table top. Please clean up chair legs and other furniture feet before stick felt pads for best effect.

100% GUARANTEE - All customers receive a lifetime 100% satisfaction guarantee, making this a risk-free purchase. We take pride in providing the highest quality and most durable felt furniture pads on the market are happy to guarantee our product. If you have any problem at all, please contact us so that we can resolve your problem.
description: Product Description SAVE MONEY AND ENERGY YOU SPEND TO PROTECT THESE WITH OUR FURNITURE FELT PADS. Felt pads for furniture on hardwood floors Yelanon do protect the furniture and floor you loved from scratches and scuffs in your lovely home. Have a great adhesive to stick perfectly on any furniture legs. Our felt furniture pads & protectors have the tenacious adhesive which tightly holds pads on the furniture for a long period of time. 10 Most Useful Sizes & Shapes Most Used Different Sizes LARGE - （ 5" x 6", 6"x1/2") can cut out the shape and size you need MEDIUM - （ 2", 2" x 2", 1.5", 1" x 1", 1" ) for table legs/ heavy furniture/ couch feet. SMALL - （ 3/8", 3/4" ,3/4"X3/4") for chair & arm-chair legs/ small items. Wipe table legs clean before use Peel off the adhesive backing and stick it to the table legs. Just press firmly and stick. Installation complete WHAT DO YELANON FURNITURE PADS DO FOR YOUR HOME? Previous page Next page DIVERSITY SIZES - Best protection for Your wooden, laminate or tiled floors and suitable for all types of furniture. ANTI SCRATCH - Prevent your surfaces from getting scratches, nicks, and dents while reducing noise and eliminating vibrations with our thick Heavy Duty Felt Pad. What material are these? It consists of high quality rubber and soft felt with adhesive. How thick are these furniture pads? It is about 3 inches thick and is suitable for most furniture. Do the furniture slide after you put the pads on? Yes, it will slide, this product is to prevent scratches on the floor and prevent noise, not to prevent sliding. Is the back adhesive firm? If you wipe the object surface before use, it will stick firmly when it dries. Does this work on hardwood flooring? Yes, this product is suitable for all smooth hard floors including hardwood, tile and marble etc. Not applicable to soft floors such as carpets.
